events.title: Dorchester: 97 Millet Street Abutters Meeting
events.description: Event Date: Mon, 06/08/2026 - 6:00pm - Mon, 06/08/2026 - 7:00pm Address: VIRTUAL VIA ZOOM United States Seeking a two-story mudroom and bedroom addition to the rear/side of the existing residence. The purpose of this meeting is to get community input and listen to the resident's positions on this proposal. This is a virtual meeting via Zoom . Meeting ID: 165

events.title: Orgullo Latino - POP Block Party
events.description: Event Date: Sat, 06/06/2026 - 1:00pm - Sat, 06/06/2026 - 3:00pm Address: Summer Street Plaza Boston , MA United States Orgullo Latino, a dedicated Latin Pride celebration featuring two hours of programming entirely in Spanish. Publish Date: Thu, 06/04/2026 - 12:26pm

events.title: POP Block Party
events.description: Event Date: Sat, 06/06/2026 - 1:00pm - Sat, 06/06/2026 - 6:00pm Address: Summer Street Plaza Boston , MA United States From 1 – 3 p.m., experience Orgullo Latino (Latin Pride), a fully Spanish-language From 3:00 - 6:00 p.m., POP Out The Dark brings together queer performers of all walks of life for an afternoon full of joy and community. Publish Date: Thu, 0

events.title: , Stone Zoo
events.description: Round up your crew for a flavor-packed night of food, drinks and wild fun. Franklin Park Zoo 10:00 a.m. - 5:00 p.m. Step into the Aussie Aviary to watch hundreds of colorful budgies fly freely—and even feed them by hand if one lands nearby. Weather permitting

events.title: , Stone Zoo
events.description: Sip into the wild! 80+ great wines & gourmet foods, wine classes, animals, and much more! Franklin Park Zoo 1:30 p.m. Join us for a chat about the world's tallest land mammal and how you can help protect them in the wild. Weather permitting
